Soul Plane (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $13,922,211Details
International Box Office $631,596
Worldwide Box Office $14,553,807
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,648,486 (40.6% of total gross)
Legs:2.46 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:95.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$16,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,566 opening theaters/1,566 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $26,813,148

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 28th, 2004 (Wide) by MGM
International Releases: November 19th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: September 7th, 2004 by MGM Video
MPA Rating: R for strong sexual content, language and some drug use
Running Time: 86 minutes
Plot point: African Americans
Social setting: In a Plane, Travel Industry
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
